#[derive(Default)]
struct QueryOptions {
    limit: Option<usize>,
    offset: Option<usize>,
    distinct: bool,
    case_sensitive: bool,
}

enum DeletedPolicy {
    Exclude,
    Include,
    OnlyDeleted,
}

struct QueryBuilder {
    table: String,
    filters: Vec<String>,
    options: QueryOptions,
    deleted_policy: DeletedPolicy,
    mode: QueryMode,
}

enum QueryMode {
    Select,
    Count,
}

impl QueryBuilder {
    fn new(table: &str) -> Self {
        Self {
            table: table.into(),
            filters: Vec::new(),
            options: QueryOptions::default(),
            deleted_policy: DeletedPolicy::Exclude,
            mode: QueryMode::Select,
        }
    }

    fn options(mut self, opts: QueryOptions) -> Self {
        self.options = opts;
        self
    }

    fn deleted_policy(mut self, policy: DeletedPolicy) -> Self {
        self.deleted_policy = policy;
        self
    }

    fn mode(mut self, mode: QueryMode) -> Self {
        self.mode = mode;
        self
    }

    fn build(self) -> String {
        format!("SELECT * FROM {}", self.table)
    }
}

fn run_query() {
    let qb = QueryBuilder::new("users")
        .options(QueryOptions {
            limit: Some(100),
            distinct: true,
            ..Default::default()
        })
        .deleted_policy(DeletedPolicy::Exclude);
    let _ = qb.build();
}
